journey.name: CoinJoin create pool dialog
journey.description: Opens the create-pool dialog from the CoinJoin screen, enters a denomination, and confirms the app surfaces a status/error rather than crashing. A full round needs real relay peers and a matching UTXO, so this only exercises the local create-pool UI flow.

actions.action: Launch the Mandacaru app and wait for the splash screen to dismiss (poll until nav_node is present)
Verify the pool list (coinjoin_pool_list) is displayed
Verify a dialog titled "Create a pool" is displayed
Verify the app shows either an active-round status or an error snackbar, and has not crashed
